title: Me, Me, Me... and the Others
writer: Alessandro Blasetti, Carlo Romano, Agenore Incrocci
actors: Gina Lollobrigida, Silvana Mangano, Walter Chiari
plot: Sandro is a well-known journalist and he is conducting a survey on human selfishness. Every man and every woman he meets turns into a theme for his inquiry. Even his own wife, Titta. But little by little Sandro identifies himself ...
